ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Ticket identifier associated with the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the passenger */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the passenger */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program identifier associated with the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_loyalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., S, C, Q) */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the ticket */,
  "cabin_type_id" INTEGER /* Cabin type identifier associated with the ticket */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the ticket */,
  "booking_agent_id" INTEGER /* Travel agent identifier who made the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_cabin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_type_id") REFERENCES cabin_types ("cabin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_booking_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_agent_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger making the reservation */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the reservation */,
  "cabin_type_id" INTEGER /* Cabin type identifier associated with the reservation */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the reservation */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests for the reservation */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_cabin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_type_id") REFERENCES cabin_types ("cabin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the passenger */,
  "loyalty_level" TEXT /* Current loyalty level of the passenger */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger associated with the loyalty program entry */,
  "points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were earned */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the passenger */,
  "points_redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member on the cruise */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the staff member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the staff member */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the activity */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the activity */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff member identifier responsible for the activity */,
  "activity_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "activity_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the activity, if applicable */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Booking status of the activity (e.g., fully booked, available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity participated in */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger participating */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the participation */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Booking status of the participation (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_participation_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_participation_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_participation_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Ticket identifier associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the transaction */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Refund status of the transaction */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the passenger */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Activity identifier associated with the feedback, if applicable */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff member identifier associated with the feedback, if applicable */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkations" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation record */,
  "port" TEXT /* Port where the cruise departs */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for embarkation */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the embarkation */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time of embarkation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkations_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_types" (
  "cabin_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabin type (e.g., Suite, Balcony) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cabin type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the cabin type per night */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the cabin can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger making the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., dietary, accessibility) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the request */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Cruise identifier associated with the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruises" (
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cruise */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cruise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cruise */,
  "itinerary" TEXT /* Itinerary of the cruise */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the cruise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cruise (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_id")
)
